2603.19514.title: Learning to Disprove: Formal Counterexample Generation with Large Language Models
2603.19514.paper_summary: Mathematical reasoning demands two critical, complementary skills: constructing rigorous proofs for true statements and discovering counterexamples that disprove false ones. However, current AI efforts in mathematics focus almost exclusively on proof construction, often neglecting the equally important task of finding counterexamples. In this paper, we address this gap by fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) to reason about and generate counterexamples. We formalize this task as formal counterexample generation, which requires LLMs not only to propose candidate counterexamples but also to produce formal proofs that can be automatically verified in the Lean 4 theorem prover. To enable effective learning, we introduce a symbolic mutation strategy that synthesizes diverse training data by systematically extracting theorems and discarding selected hypotheses, thereby producing diverse counterexample instances. Together with curated datasets, this strategy enables a multi-reward expert iteration framework that substantially enhances both the effectiveness and efficiency of training LLMs for counterexample generation and theorem proving. Experiments on three newly collected benchmarks validate the advantages of our approach, showing that the mutation strategy and training framework yield significant performance gains.
2603.19514.paper_summary_zh: 數學推理需要兩項關鍵的互補技能：為真命題構建嚴謹的證明，以及發現反例以駁斥假命題。<lb/>然而，當前的人工智慧在數學領域的努力幾乎專注於證明構建，往往忽略了同樣重要的尋找反例的任務。<lb/>在本文中，我們通過微調大型語言模型（LLMs）來解決這一空白，使其能夠推理並生成反例。<lb/>我們將這一任務形式化為正式反例生成，這要求LLMs不僅要提出候選反例，還要生成可以在Lean 4定理證明器中自動驗證的正式證明。<lb/>為了實現有效的學習，我們引入了一種符號突變策略，通過系統地提取定理並丟棄選定的假設來合成多樣的訓練數據，從而生成多樣的反例實例。<lb/>結合精心策劃的數據集，這一策略使得一個多獎勵專家迭代框架得以實現，顯著提高了LLMs在反例生成和定理證明方面的訓練效果和效率。<lb/>在三個新收集的基準測試上的實驗驗證了我們方法的優勢，顯示出突變策略和訓練框架帶來了顯著的性能提升。
2603.19514.author: Zenan Li et.al.
2603.19514.authors: Zenan Li, Zhaoyu Li, Kaiyu Yang, Xiaoxing Ma, Zhendong Su
